theme_and_archetype.description: A sleek, authoritative dark mode inspired by Linear.app and Betterstack. Utilizes deep tinted greys (Zinc), stark white for high contrast typography, and WhatsApp Green / Electric Blue as kinetic triggers to drive conversions.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Tetris Grid (Bento mode) for features: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl (nested radii required for inner elements)

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-zinc-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

hero_section.layout: Asymmetrical 2-column on desktop (Text left, Mockup right)
hero_section.background: Use 'hero_bg_mesh' with bg-zinc-950/60 overlay to ensure text contrast
hero_section.headline: Complete MVNO Management System
hero_section.visual: Floating 3D-like perspective or layered mockup using '/demo-dashboard.jpg'

features_bento.layout: Grid Cols 12. Mix spans: col-span-12 md:col-span-8, col-span-12 md:col-span-4
features_bento.cards_style: Neumorphic/Glass hybrid: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform

screenshot_carousel.style: Full-width marquee or interactive Swiper gallery

cards.style: The Tracing Beam / Highlighted border-blue-500/50, scaled up slightly

whatsapp_fab.description: Fixed bottom-right WhatsApp floating action button for constant conversion access.
whatsapp_fab.classes: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 rounded-full p-4 bg-[#25D366] text-black shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons (e.g., WhatsappLogo, Users, Receipt, QrCode) with weight='duotone'.
Strictly follow the color palette: Avoid pure #000000. Use Zinc scale.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, links, forms).
The 24-month pricing card MUST be visually highlighted compared to the 12-month card.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Add Google Fonts links for 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in index.html.
Ensure the hero background image has a dark overlay (`bg-zinc-950/60` or similar) to keep the text readable.
Local screenshots MUST be loaded exactly with the paths provided (e.g., ) as they exist in the public directory.
